verses.latin_vulgate: Justus quidem tu es, Domine, si disputem tecum :  verumtamen justa loquar ad te :  Quare via impiorum prosperatur ;  bene est omnibus qui prævaricantur et inique agunt ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַדִּ֤יק אַתָּה֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֥י אָרִ֖יב אֵלֶ֑יךָ אַ֤ךְ מִשְׁפָּטִים֙ אֲדַבֵּ֣ר אֹתָ֔ךְ מַדּ֗וּעַ דֶּ֤רֶךְ רְשָׁעִים֙ צָלֵ֔חָה שָׁל֖וּ כׇּל־בֹּ֥גְדֵי בָֽגֶד׃
verses.king_james: Righteous art thou, O Lord, when I plead with thee: yet let me talk with thee of thy judgments: Wherefore doth the way of the wicked prosper? wherefore are all they happy that deal very treacherously?

verses.latin_vulgate: Plantasti eos, et radicem miserunt :  proficiunt, et faciunt fructum :  prope es tu ori eorum,  et longe a renibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְטַעְתָּם֙ גַּם־שֹׁרָ֔שׁוּ יֵלְכ֖וּ גַּם־עָ֣שׂוּ פֶ֑רִי קָר֤וֹב אַתָּה֙ בְּפִיהֶ֔ם וְרָח֖וֹק מִכִּלְיוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast planted them, yea, they have taken root: they grow, yea, they bring forth fruit: thou art near in their mouth, and far from their reins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, Domine, nosti me, vidisti me,  et probasti cor meum tecum.  Congrega eos quasi gregem ad victimam,  et sanctifica eos in die occisionis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ יְדַעְתָּ֔נִי תִּרְאֵ֕נִי וּבָחַנְתָּ֥ לִבִּ֖י אִתָּ֑ךְ הַתִּקֵם֙ כְּצֹ֣אן לְטִבְחָ֔ה וְהַקְדִּשֵׁ֖ם לְי֥וֹם הֲרֵגָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But thou, O Lord, knowest me: thou hast seen me, and tried mine heart toward thee: pull them out like sheep for the slaughter, and prepare them for the day of slaughter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo lugebit terra,  et herba omnis regionis siccabitur,  propter malitiam habitantium in ea ?  Consumptum est animal, et volucre,  quoniam dixerunt : Non videbit novissima nostra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָתַי֙ תֶּאֱבַ֣ל הָאָ֔רֶץ וְעֵ֥שֶׂב כׇּל־הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה יִיבָ֑שׁ מֵרָעַ֣ת יֹֽשְׁבֵי־בָ֗הּ סָפְתָ֤ה בְהֵמוֹת֙ וָע֔וֹף כִּ֣י אָֽמְר֔וּ לֹ֥א יִרְאֶ֖ה אֶת־אַחֲרִיתֵֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: How long shall the land mourn, and the herbs of every field wither, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein? the beasts are consumed, and the birds; because they said, He shall not see our last end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si cum peditibus currens laborasti,  quomodo contendere poteris cum equis ?  cum autem in terra pacis securus fueris,  quid facies in superbia Jordanis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אֶת־רַגְלִ֥ים ׀ רַ֙צְתָּה֙ וַיַּלְא֔וּךָ וְאֵ֥יךְ תְּתַחֲרֶ֖ה אֶת־הַסּוּסִ֑ים וּבְאֶ֤רֶץ שָׁלוֹם֙ אַתָּ֣ה בוֹטֵ֔חַ וְאֵ֥יךְ תַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה בִּגְא֥וֹן הַיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.king_james: If thou hast run with the footmen, and they have wearied thee, then how canst thou contend with horses? and if in the land of peace, wherein thou trustedst, they wearied thee, then how wilt thou do in the swelling of Jordan?

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et fratres tui, et domus patris tui,  etiam ipsi pugnaverunt adversum te,  et clamaverunt post te plena voce :  ne credas eis,  cum locuti fuerint tibi bona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֧י גַם־אַחֶ֣יךָ וּבֵית־אָבִ֗יךָ גַּם־הֵ֙מָּה֙ בָּ֣גְדוּ בָ֔ךְ גַּם־הֵ֛מָּה קָרְא֥וּ אַחֲרֶ֖יךָ מָלֵ֑א אַל־תַּאֲמֵ֣ן בָּ֔ם כִּֽי־יְדַבְּר֥וּ אֵלֶ֖יךָ טוֹבֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For even thy brethren, and the house of thy father, even they have dealt treacherously with thee; yea, they have called a multitude after thee: believe them not, though they speak fair words unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqui domum meam ;  dimisi hæreditatem meam :  dedi dilectam animam meam in manu inimicorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָזַ֙בְתִּי֙ אֶת־בֵּיתִ֔י נָטַ֖שְׁתִּי אֶת־נַחֲלָתִ֑י נָתַ֛תִּי אֶת־יְדִד֥וּת נַפְשִׁ֖י בְּכַ֥ף אֹיְבֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: I have forsaken mine house, I have left mine heritage; I have given the dearly beloved of my soul into the hand of her enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Facta est mihi hæreditas mea quasi leo in silva :  dedit contra me vocem, ideo odivi eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָיְתָה־לִּ֥י נַחֲלָתִ֖י כְּאַרְיֵ֣ה בַיָּ֑עַר נָתְנָ֥ה עָלַ֛י בְּקוֹלָ֖הּ עַל־כֵּ֥ן שְׂנֵאתִֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Mine heritage is unto me as a lion in the forest; it crieth out against me: therefore have I hated it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid avis discolor hæreditas mea mihi ?  numquid avis tincta per totum ?  Venite, congregamini, omnes bestiæ terræ :  properate ad devorandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַעַ֨יִט צָב֤וּעַ נַֽחֲלָתִי֙ לִ֔י הַעַ֖יִט סָבִ֣יב עָלֶ֑יהָ לְכ֗וּ אִסְפ֛וּ כׇּל־חַיַּ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה הֵתָ֥יוּ לְאׇכְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Mine heritage is unto me as a speckled bird, the birds round about are against her; come ye, assemble all the beasts of the field, come to devour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pastores multi demoliti sunt vineam meam,  conculcaverunt partem meam,  dederunt portionem meam desiderabilem in desertum solitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹעִ֤ים רַבִּים֙ שִׁחֲת֣וּ כַרְמִ֔י בֹּסְס֖וּ אֶת־חֶלְקָתִ֑י נָ֥תְנ֛וּ אֶת־חֶלְקַ֥ת חֶמְדָּתִ֖י לְמִדְבַּ֥ר שְׁמָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Many pastors have destroyed my vineyard, they have trodden my portion under foot, they have made my pleasant portion a desolate wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Posuerunt eam in dissipationem,  luxitque super me :  desolatione desolata est omnis terra,  quia nullus est qui recogitet corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂמָהּ֙ לִשְׁמָמָ֔ה אָבְלָ֥ה עָלַ֖י שְׁמֵמָ֑ה נָשַׁ֙מָּה֙ כׇּל־הָאָ֔רֶץ כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין אִ֖ישׁ שָׂ֥ם עַל־לֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: They have made it desolate, and being desolate it mourneth unto me; the whole land is made desolate, because no man layeth it to heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super omnes vias deserti venerunt vastatores,  quia gladius Domini devorabit :  ab extremo terræ usque ad extremum ejus,  non est pax universæ carni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַֽל־כׇּל־שְׁפָיִ֣ם בַּמִּדְבָּ֗ר בָּ֚אוּ שֹֽׁדְדִ֔ים כִּ֣י חֶ֤רֶב לַֽיהֹוָה֙ אֹֽכְלָ֔ה מִקְצֵה־אֶ֖רֶץ וְעַד־קְצֵ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ אֵ֥ין שָׁל֖וֹם לְכׇל־בָּשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The spoilers are come upon all high places through the wilderness: for the sword of the Lord shall devour from the one end of the land even to the other end of the land: no flesh shall have peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Seminaverunt triticum,  et spinas messuerunt :  hæreditatem acceperunt,  et non eis proderit.  Confundemini a fructibus vestris  propter iram furoris Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָרְע֤וּ חִטִּים֙ וְקֹצִ֣ים קָצָ֔רוּ נֶחְל֖וּ לֹ֣א יוֹעִ֑לוּ וּבֹ֙שׁוּ֙ מִתְּבוּאֹ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם מֵחֲר֖וֹן אַף־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: They have sown wheat, but shall reap thorns: they have put themselves to pain, but shall not profit: and they shall be ashamed of your revenues because of the fierce anger of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus adversum omnes vicinos meos pessimos,  qui tangunt hæreditatem quam distribui populo meo Israël :  Ecce ego evellam eos de terra sua,  et domum Juda evellam de medio eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה עַל־כׇּל־שְׁכֵנַי֙ הָֽרָעִ֔ים הַנֹּֽגְעִים֙ בַּֽנַּחֲלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־הִנְחַ֥לְתִּי אֶת־עַמִּ֖י אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל הִנְנִ֤י נֹֽתְשָׁם֙ מֵעַ֣ל אַדְמָתָ֔ם וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהוּדָ֖ה אֶתּ֥וֹשׁ מִתּוֹכָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord against all mine evil neighbours, that touch the inheritance which I have caused my people Israel to inherit; Behold, I will pluck them out of their land, and pluck out the house of Judah from among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum evulsero eos, convertar,  et miserebor eorum, et reducam eos :  virum ad hæreditatem suam,  et virum in terram suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה אַֽחֲרֵי֙ נׇתְשִׁ֣י אוֹתָ֔ם אָשׁ֖וּב וְרִחַמְתִּ֑ים וַהֲשִׁבֹתִ֛ים אִ֥ישׁ לְנַחֲלָת֖וֹ וְאִ֥ישׁ לְאַרְצֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, after that I have plucked them out I will return, and have compassion on them, and will bring them again, every man to his heritage, and every man to his land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : si eruditi didicerint vias populi mei,  ut jurent in nomine meo : Vivit Dominus !  sicut docuerunt populum meum jurare in Baal,  ædificabuntur in medio populi mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֡ה אִם־לָמֹ֣ד יִלְמְדוּ֩ אֶת־דַּֽרְכֵ֨י עַמִּ֜י לְהִשָּׁבֵ֤עַ בִּשְׁמִי֙ חַי־יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר לִמְּדוּ֙ אֶת־עַמִּ֔י לְהִשָּׁבֵ֖עַ בַּבָּ֑עַל וְנִבְנ֖וּ בְּת֥וֹךְ עַמִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, if they will diligently learn the ways of my people, to swear by my name, The Lord liveth; as they taught my people to swear by Baal; then shall they be built in the midst of my people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si non audierint,  evellam gentem illam evulsione et perditione, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֖ם לֹ֣א יִשְׁמָ֑עוּ וְנָ֨תַשְׁתִּ֜י אֶת־הַגּ֥וֹי הַה֛וּא נָת֥וֹשׁ וְאַבֵּ֖ד נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: But if they will not obey, I will utterly pluck up and destroy that nation, saith the Lord.
